name: I Love Lucy
description: Lucy and Ricky Ricardo, the Mertzes, and the show that invented the modern sitcom.

questions.q: Who starred in the title role on 'I Love Lucy'?
Who played Lucy's husband, Ricky Ricardo?

source.notes: Arnaz and Lucille Ball were married in real life (1940–1960).

questions.q: Who played Fred Mertz, the Ricardos' landlord and Ricky's best friend?
Who played Ethel Mertz, Lucy's best friend?
On which network did 'I Love Lucy' originally air?
In what year did 'I Love Lucy' premiere?
How many half-hour episodes of 'I Love Lucy' were produced?
How many seasons did 'I Love Lucy' run?
What was Lucy Ricardo's maiden name on the show?

source.notes: Lucy's mother is Mrs. McGillicuddy on the show.

questions.q: What is Ricky Ricardo's profession?

source.notes: Plays the conga drum and leads the band at the Tropicana Club.

questions.q: What was the cinematic innovation that made 'I Love Lucy' the first scripted TV sitcom shot on it?

source.notes: Director of photography Karl Freund developed the multi-camera technique we still use today.

questions.q: Where was 'I Love Lucy' typically filmed?
choices: In front of a live studio audience

source.notes: Innovation: full multi-camera live-audience filming on 35mm — the template for sitcoms ever since.

questions.q: Which production company, co-founded by Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz, produced 'I Love Lucy'?

source.notes: Desilu later produced 'Star Trek', 'Mission: Impossible', and 'The Untouchables'.

questions.q: What is the name of the Ricardos' son on the show?

source.notes: Little Ricky's birth episode (Jan 19, 1953) coincided with Desi Arnaz Jr.'s real birth and drew 44 million viewers.

questions.q: What is Ricky's iconic catchphrase when Lucy gets into trouble?
choices: Lucy, you got some 'splaining to do!

source.notes: Often misquoted as 'You got a lot of explaining to do.'

questions.q: What was the name of the New York nightclub where Ricky Ricardo's band performed?

source.notes: Fictional club; Ricky later opened his own called the Babalu Club.

questions.q: What sponsor advertised on 'I Love Lucy' from its 1951 pilot through its early seasons?

source.notes: Philip Morris cigarettes were the original full-show sponsor.

questions.q: What was the renamed format of the series after the original run, with hour-long specials?
How many Emmy Awards did 'I Love Lucy' win during its run?
In what U.S. state was Lucy Ricardo (and Lucille Ball) said to be from?

source.notes: Both Lucy Ricardo and the actress Lucille Ball are from Jamestown, NY.
